item.description: Rodrigo De Paul abre su corazón al recordar la inspiración que encontró en Diego Maradona y Lionel Messi. El mediocampista argentino también reflexiona sobre el orgullo, el sacrificio familiar y por qué siente que todo valió la pena.

media:content.media:title: El verdadero significado de vestir la camiseta argentina | Vive el Mundial
media:content.media:description: Rodrigo De Paul abre su corazón al recordar la inspiración que encontró en Diego Maradona y Lionel Messi. El mediocampista argentino también reflexiona sobre el orgullo, el sacrificio familiar y por qué siente que todo valió la pena.

item.title: El verdadero significado de vestir la camiseta argentina | Vive el Mundial

item.description: Revive el único antecedente mundialista entre Colombia y Suiza. En Estados Unidos 1994, los cafeteros ya estaban eliminados cuando cayeron ante los europeos en un partido que dejó un amargo recuerdo.

media:content.media:title: Colombia vs. Suiza: el recuerdo que los cafeteros quieren borrar | Vive el Mundial
media:content.media:description: Revive el único antecedente mundialista entre Colombia y Suiza. En Estados Unidos 1994, los cafeteros ya estaban eliminados cuando cayeron ante los europeos en un partido que dejó un amargo recuerdo.

item.title: Colombia vs. Suiza: el recuerdo que los cafeteros quieren borrar | Vive el Mundial

item.description: La selección de Egipto calienta en la cancha del Estadio Atlanta para enfrentarse a los actuales campeones del mundo, en un partido que definirá si el equipo de Salah, Ashour y el entrenador Hossam Hassan logrará pasar a cuartos de final.

media:content.media:title: Los ‘Faraones’ calientan motores para enfrentar uno de los partidos más grandes de su historia
media:content.media:description: La selección de Egipto calienta en la cancha del Estadio Atlanta para enfrentarse a los actuales campeones del mundo, en un partido que definirá si el equipo de Salah, Ashour y el entrenador Hossam Hassan logrará pasar a cuartos de final.

item.title: Los ‘Faraones’ calientan motores para enfrentar uno de los partidos más grandes de su historia

item.description: La Selección de Argentina ha comenzado a prepararse para el duelo ante el Egipto de Mohamed Salah. La albiceleste llega de un partido complicado ante Cabo Verde pero hoy escribirán una nueva historia.

media:content.media:title: Ya se alista Lionel Messi y compañía para el enfrentamiento clave ante Egipto
media:content.media:description: La Selección de Argentina ha comenzado a prepararse para el duelo ante el Egipto de Mohamed Salah. La albiceleste llega de un partido complicado ante Cabo Verde pero hoy escribirán una nueva historia.

item.title: Ya se alista Lionel Messi y compañía para el enfrentamiento clave ante Egipto

item.description: Rodrigo De Paul abre su corazón al recordar la inspiración que encontró en Diego Maradona y Lionel Messi. El mediocampista argentino también reflexiona sobre el orgullo, el sacrificio familiar y por qué siente que todo valió la pena.

media:content.media:title: El verdadero significado de vestir la camiseta argentina | Vive el Mundial
media:content.media:description: Rodrigo De Paul abre su corazón al recordar la inspiración que encontró en Diego Maradona y Lionel Messi. El mediocampista argentino también reflexiona sobre el orgullo, el sacrificio familiar y por qué siente que todo valió la pena.

item.title: El verdadero significado de vestir la camiseta argentina | Vive el Mundial

item.description: Desde el Fan Village de Telemundo en el Rockefeller Center, los aficionados argentinos vivieron la previa del duelo ante Egipto con ilusión total. Entre cantos, pronósticos y la confianza puesta en Lionel Messi, la Albiceleste sueña con seguir avanzando.

media:content.media:title: Argentina sueña en grande desde el Fan Village de Telemundo en Rockefeller Center | Hoy En El Mundial
media:content.media:description: Desde el Fan Village de Telemundo en el Rockefeller Center, los aficionados argentinos vivieron la previa del duelo ante Egipto con ilusión total. Entre cantos, pronósticos y la confianza puesta en Lionel Messi, la Albiceleste sueña con seguir avanzando.

item.title: Argentina sueña en grande desde el Fan Village de Telemundo en Rockefeller Center | Hoy En El Mundial

item.description: El jugador de la selección egipcia aclaró que el partido contra Argentina puede ser el más importante en la historia de su equipo nacional, y darán el 100% para llevarse el triunfo y pasar de ronda.

media:content.media:title: Hafez: "Ante Argentina, podríamos morir por ganar ese partido"
media:content.media:description: El jugador de la selección egipcia aclaró que el partido contra Argentina puede ser el más importante en la historia de su equipo nacional, y darán el 100% para llevarse el triunfo y pasar de ronda.

item.title: Hafez: "Ante Argentina, podríamos morir por ganar ese partido"

item.description: Julio Comesaña abrió el baúl de los recuerdos sobre los primeros pasos de Luis Díaz. El entrenador que impulsó su carrera recordó cómo descubrió su talento y destacó la evolución del colombiano hasta convertirse en una de las figuras del Mundial 2026

media:content.media:title: El primer entrenador de Luis Díaz revive los inicios de la estrella colombiana | Hoy En El Mundial
media:content.media:description: Julio Comesaña abrió el baúl de los recuerdos sobre los primeros pasos de Luis Díaz. El entrenador que impulsó su carrera recordó cómo descubrió su talento y destacó la evolución del colombiano hasta convertirse en una de las figuras del Mundial 2026

item.title: El primer entrenador de Luis Díaz revive los inicios de la estrella colombiana | Hoy En El Mundial

item.description: La albiceleste llega a Atlanta tras una clasificación sufrida ante Cabo Verde, el ex defensor argentino, Roberto Ayala analiza a Egipto y comparte las sensaciones del equipo previo al inicio de los octavos de final.

media:content.media:title: Roberto Ayala: “Venimos de un partido complicado, hay ganas de revancha”
media:content.media:description: La albiceleste llega a Atlanta tras una clasificación sufrida ante Cabo Verde, el ex defensor argentino, Roberto Ayala analiza a Egipto y comparte las sensaciones del equipo previo al inicio de los octavos de final.

item.title: Roberto Ayala: “Venimos de un partido complicado, hay ganas de revancha”

item.description: El portero suplente de la selección argentina se refirió antes del juego ante Egipto a la dificultad del rival, pero aclaró que sea cual sea el oponente, ellos como familia siempre interpondrán el escudo que representan para llevarse la victoria.

media:content.media:title: Juan Musso: "Hoy no es distinto a Cabo Verde, pero ponemos ante cualquier rival nuestro escudo"
media:content.media:description: El portero suplente de la selección argentina se refirió antes del juego ante Egipto a la dificultad del rival, pero aclaró que sea cual sea el oponente, ellos como familia siempre interpondrán el escudo que representan para llevarse la victoria.

item.title: Juan Musso: "Hoy no es distinto a Cabo Verde, pero ponemos ante cualquier rival nuestro escudo"

item.description: A growing number of prominent Democrats are calling on Maine Senate nominee Graham Platner to drop out of the race following a new sexual assault allegation. The claim comes from a former romantic partner who shared details of an incident from five years ago. Platner has explicitly denied the allegations. NBC’s Ryan Nobles reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: Calls Grow for Graham Platner to Quit Race Over New Allegation
media:content.media:description: A growing number of prominent Democrats are calling on Maine Senate nominee Graham Platner to drop out of the race following a new sexual assault allegation. The claim comes from a former romantic partner who shared details of an incident from five years ago. Platner has explicitly denied the allegations. NBC’s Ryan Nobles reports for TODAY.

item.title: Calls Grow for Graham Platner to Quit Race Over New Allegation

item.description: President Donald Trump and his NATO counterparts are set to gather in Turkey for a critical two-day summit, meeting with allies on Iran, Ukraine and other critical foreign policy challenges. NBC’s Garrett Haake report for TODAY from Ankara.

media:content.media:title: Trump to Meet NATO Leaders Amid Doubts Over His Commitment
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump and his NATO counterparts are set to gather in Turkey for a critical two-day summit, meeting with allies on Iran, Ukraine and other critical foreign policy challenges. NBC’s Garrett Haake report for TODAY from Ankara.

item.title: Trump to Meet NATO Leaders Amid Doubts Over His Commitment

item.dc:creator: Chantal Da Silva
item.description: Far-right leader Marine Le Pen will be able to run in France’s presidential election next year, though her involvement remained in doubt Tuesday after a Paris appeals court upheld her conviction for misusing European Union funds.

media:content.media:text: FRANCE-POLITICS-MEDIA
media:content.media:description: Marine Le Pen on Wednesday.

item.title: French court allows far-right leader Marine Le Pen to run for president with ankle tag

item.description: The New Year's Eve ball in Times Square has dropped for America's 250th anniversary, making this the first time the ball has dropped outside of a New Year's celebration.

media:content.media:title: New Year's Eve ball drops in Times Square for America's 250th
media:content.media:description: The New Year's Eve ball in Times Square has dropped for America's 250th anniversary, making this the first time the ball has dropped outside of a New Year's celebration.

item.title: New Year's Eve ball drops in Times Square for America's 250th

item.dc:creator: Samantha Elkins
item.description: AI company Anthropic announced that it is moving its popular Claude Cowork agent to the cloud, making it accessible to users from multiple devices.

media:content.media:text: Anthropic's "Code with Claude" Conference
media:content.media:description: Attendees at Anthropic's Code with Claude developer conference in San Francisco on May 6.

item.title: Anthropic will make Claude Cowork available to users via the cloud

item.dc:creator: David Hickey
item.description: The United States’ World Cup campaign was brought to a screeching halt in Seattle last night by a Belgian team that played as if it had extra motivation after the Folarin Balogun affair.

media:content.media:text: USA v Belgium: Round of 16 - FIFA World Cup 2026
media:content.media:description: Romelu Lukaku #9 of Belgium celebrates with teammates after scoring the team's fourth goal during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Round of 16 match between USA and Belgium at Seattle Stadium on July 06, 2026 in Seattle, Washington.

media:content.media:text: Mauricio Pochettino, Head Coach of the United States, speaks with players in a huddle after the 1-4 loss during the FIFA World Cup 2026.
media:content.media:description: Romelu Lukaku #9 of Belgium celebrates with teammates after scoring the team's fourth goal during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Round of 16 match between USA and Belgium at Seattle Stadium on July 06, 2026 in Seattle, Washington.

media:content.media:text: Lionel Messi runs in celebration near a soccer net on the field
media:content.media:description: Romelu Lukaku #9 of Belgium celebrates with teammates after scoring the team's fourth goal during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Round of 16 match between USA and Belgium at Seattle Stadium on July 06, 2026 in Seattle, Washington.

item.title: From The Sports Desk: Belgium demolishes the U.S. 4-1, and then trolls it afterward

item.dc:creator: Matt Lavietes
item.description: Canadian astronaut Jeremy Hansen announced Monday that he is stepping down from his full-time role as an astronaut, months after flying around the moon on NASA’s Artemis II mission.

media:content.media:text: NASA and Canadian Space Agency astronauts assigned to the Artemis II mission arrive at Kennedy Space Center in Florida on March 27, 2026, to begin final pre-launch preparations for the first crewed lunar flyby in the Artemis program.
media:content.media:description: Jeremy Hansen at the Kennedy Space Center in Florida in March ahead of the Artemis II launch.

item.title: Artemis II astronaut Jeremy Hansen stepping down from full-time role

item.dc:creator: Adela Suliman
item.description: LONDON — Nigel Farage, a British right-wing leader and staunch ally of President Donald Trump, said Tuesday that he would resign his political seat and rerun in a move that shocked the nation and appeared to be an attempt to save his political career.

media:content.media:text: eform UK Leader Nigel Farage delivers a statement on his "future in public life" at Millbank Tower on July 7, 2026 in London.
media:content.media:description: Reform UK Leader Nigel Farage delivers a statement on his "future in public life" on Tuesday.

media:content.media:text: Nigel Farage speaks at a Trump campaign rally
media:content.media:description: Reform UK Leader Nigel Farage delivers a statement on his "future in public life" on Tuesday.

media:content.media:text: Nigel Farage Speaks Out Against The Government's Possible Ban On Smoking Outside
media:content.media:description: Reform UK Leader Nigel Farage delivers a statement on his "future in public life" on Tuesday.

item.title: Trump ally and hard-right leader Nigel Farage triggers vote, in bid to clear name amid financial scandals

item.dc:creator: Chantal Da Silva
item.description: Far-right leader Marine Le Pen will be able to run in France’s presidential election next year, though her involvement remained in doubt Tuesday after a Paris appeals court upheld her conviction for misusing European Union funds.

media:content.media:text: FRANCE-POLITICS-MEDIA
media:content.media:description: Marine Le Pen on Wednesday.

item.title: French court allows far-right leader Marine Le Pen to run for president with ankle tag

item.dc:creator: Cory Fernandez
item.description: The Ninja Flip air fryer is 40% off and under $150. Plus, it’s great for small homes and kitchens because of this one amazing feature.

media:content.media:text: Ninja’s air fryer toaster oven comes with a fryer basket and sheet pan.
media:content.media:description: Ninja’s air fryer toaster oven comes with a fryer basket and sheet pan.

media:content.media:text: Ninja’s air fryer toaster oven comes with a fryer basket and sheet pan.
media:content.media:description: Ninja’s air fryer toaster oven comes with a fryer basket and sheet pan.

item.title: Get this space-saving Ninja air fryer for $100 off before the next heatwave

item.dc:creator: Zoe Malin
item.description: We tested compression socks from Comrad, Bombas, Wellow, Feetures and more to find the best options for travel, workouts, pregnancy and everyday wear.

media:content.media:text: Graduated compression socks are best for casual wearers, while anti-embolism compression socks require a doctor’s recommendation.
media:content.media:description: Graduated compression socks are best for casual wearers, while anti-embolism compression socks require a doctor’s recommendation.

media:content.media:text: Graduated compression socks are best for casual wearers, while anti-embolism compression socks require a doctor’s recommendation.
media:content.media:description: Graduated compression socks are best for casual wearers, while anti-embolism compression socks require a doctor’s recommendation.

media:content.media:text: Two legs in the air wearing black Ostrichpillow Bamboo Compression Socks.
media:content.media:description: Graduated compression socks are best for casual wearers, while anti-embolism compression socks require a doctor’s recommendation.

media:content.media:text: Two legs wearing Feetures’ white and grey compression socks over black leggings while standing on a wood floor in front of a white wall.
media:content.media:description: Graduated compression socks are best for casual wearers, while anti-embolism compression socks require a doctor’s recommendation.

item.title: We’ve spent years testing 20+ compression socks — these are our favorite pairs

item.dc:creator: Zoe Malin
item.description: Are water flossers as effective as dental floss? Dentists explain, and share how to properly use them.

media:content.media:text: Water flossers are especially helpful for those with dental work like braces, bridges and crowns, which can make using standard string floss near impossible.
media:content.media:description: Water flossers are especially helpful for those with dental work like braces, bridges and crowns, which can make using standard string floss near impossible.

media:content.media:text: Water flossers are especially helpful for those with dental work like braces, bridges and crowns, which can make using standard string floss near impossible.
media:content.media:description: Water flossers are especially helpful for those with dental work like braces, bridges and crowns, which can make using standard string floss near impossible.

item.title: Can water flossers replace dental floss?

item.dc:creator: Zoe Malin
item.description: We tested eight filtered shower heads over two years from Jolie, Canopy, Act+Acre and Afina to see which ones really improve hair, skin and water quality.

media:content.media:credit: Courtesy of Rebecca Rodriguez; Courtesy of Zoe Malin
media:content.media:text: Filtered showerheads purify water before it hits your body to get rid of chlorine, heavy metals and other minerals.
media:content.media:description: Filtered showerheads purify water before it hits your body to get rid of chlorine, heavy metals and other minerals.

media:content.media:credit: Courtesy of Rebecca Rodriguez; Courtesy of Zoe Malin
media:content.media:text: Filtered showerheads purify water before it hits your body to get rid of chlorine, heavy metals and other minerals.
media:content.media:description: Filtered showerheads purify water before it hits your body to get rid of chlorine, heavy metals and other minerals.

media:content.media:text: The chrome Jolie filtered showerhead installed in a bathroom
media:content.media:description: Filtered showerheads purify water before it hits your body to get rid of chlorine, heavy metals and other minerals.

media:content.media:text: Since using Sproos’ filtered showerhead, Alabi has noticed improvements in her hair and skin health, especially as someone with keratosis pilaris.
media:content.media:description: Filtered showerheads purify water before it hits your body to get rid of chlorine, heavy metals and other minerals.

media:content.media:text: A showerhead with Canopy’s Handheld Filtered Showerhead next to it, left, and a woman’s hand holding Canopy’s Handheld Filtered Showerhead off of its base.
media:content.media:description: Filtered showerheads purify water before it hits your body to get rid of chlorine, heavy metals and other minerals.

media:content.media:text: A silver AquaTru filtered showerhead installed in a bathroom.
media:content.media:description: Filtered showerheads purify water before it hits your body to get rid of chlorine, heavy metals and other minerals.

media:content.media:text: The Canopy filtered showerhead in a Polished Chrome color installed in a bathroom
media:content.media:description: Filtered showerheads purify water before it hits your body to get rid of chlorine, heavy metals and other minerals.

media:content.media:text: Hydroviv’s Filtered Showerhead installed in a bathroom.
media:content.media:description: Filtered showerheads purify water before it hits your body to get rid of chlorine, heavy metals and other minerals.

media:content.media:text: HigherDose’s Red Light Showerhead Filter installed in a bathroom.
media:content.media:description: Filtered showerheads purify water before it hits your body to get rid of chlorine, heavy metals and other minerals.

media:content.media:text: The Afina A-01 filtered showerheadead in black installed in a bathroom
media:content.media:description: Filtered showerheads purify water before it hits your body to get rid of chlorine, heavy metals and other minerals.

media:content.media:text: The Act+Acre showerhead filter installed in a bathroom
media:content.media:description: Filtered showerheads purify water before it hits your body to get rid of chlorine, heavy metals and other minerals.

media:content.media:text: A silver Nuud No1 Filtered Showerhead installed in a bathroom.
media:content.media:description: Filtered showerheads purify water before it hits your body to get rid of chlorine, heavy metals and other minerals.

item.title: We've tested 10 filtered showerheads (so far) — and yes, they really work

item.description: A New York City high-rise was evacuated during its ongoing renovation after multiple "buckling" beams were found inside the building. NBC News' Tom Winter reports on what could have caused the emergency situation at the former Pfizer headquarters.

media:content.media:title: 'Buckling' beams inside NYC high-rise trigger mass evacuations
media:content.media:description: A New York City high-rise was evacuated during its ongoing renovation after multiple "buckling" beams were found inside the building. NBC News' Tom Winter reports on what could have caused the emergency situation at the former Pfizer headquarters.

item.title: 'Buckling' beams inside NYC high-rise trigger mass evacuations

item.dc:creator: Suzanne Gamboa
item.description: Police said the man turned his gun on the Tennessee National Guard members, who were deployed to the city by a Trump administration order last year.

media:content.media:text: Memphis National Guard shooting
media:content.media:description: Tyrin Johnson provided by his grandfather Evaniel Johnson.

media:content.media:text: Image: National Guard Troops Patrol In Memphis, Tennessee
media:content.media:description: Members of the National Guard patrol in Memphis, Tenn., on Oct. 11.

item.title: National Guard soldiers fatally shoot man who had gun in downtown Memphis
